tiny_practice.action: Silently visualize yourself as a spiritual leader, reflecting on your character and integrity before God

two_step.reflect_question: How well do I manage my personal life and relationships as a potential spiritual leader?

options.text: I'm consistent in my personal and public conduct
I struggle with maintaining godly character
options.response: Seek mentorship and develop personal disciplines
Engage in intentional spiritual growth and counseling

creative_prompt.instruction: Draw a house with rooms representing different aspects of personal character: hospitality, self-control, family leadership, and spiritual maturity

reevaluation.question: How has this chapter shifted your understanding of spiritual leadership?
options: Leadership is more about character than position
Personal integrity is crucial for spiritual influence
Humility is essential in leadership roles

three_choice.question: Which leadership quality resonates most deeply with you?

choices.expansion: Leadership begins with internal integrity before external influence.
How one leads at home reveals their capacity to lead in broader contexts.
Spiritual leaders must demonstrate emotional and spiritual self-regulation.

socratic_nudge.question: If leadership is about service, why do so many seek positions of authority for personal gain?

moral_slider.question: How do personal imperfections relate to spiritual leadership?

reevaluation.question: How has your understanding of spiritual leadership transformed?
options: Recognized leadership as stewardship, not status
Understood character matters more than charisma
Saw leadership as a spiritual calling, not a career
Appreciated the holistic nature of spiritual qualification

thematic_summaries.title: Leadership Qualifications
thematic_summaries.summary: Paul provides comprehensive guidelines for church leadership character and conduct. These standards emphasize spiritual maturity, moral integrity, and family management as critical indicators of leadership readiness.

thematic_summaries.title: Spiritual Leadership Integrity
thematic_summaries.summary: Church leaders must demonstrate Christ-like character beyond mere professional competence. Their personal lives serve as living testimonies and models of spiritual transformation.

reevaluation.question: How should contemporary churches interpret leadership qualifications in light of cultural and generational changes?
options: Maintain strict, literal adherence to biblical requirements
Adapt requirements contextually while preserving core spiritual principles
Prioritize spiritual gifts and calling over specific personal criteria
Develop a nuanced, grace-based approach to leadership selection
